items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Blasts Rattle Tehran and Coastal Cities, as Iran Says U.S. Breaks Truce
items.summary: The Iranian military said it had fired in retaliation on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz. The United States did not immediately comment.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Valverde cut head when he 'accidentally hit table' in Tchouameni row
items.summary: Federico Valverde went to hospital after a dressing room row with Real Madrid team-mate Aurelien Tchouameni which left him with a head injury after he "accidentally hit a table".
